texto: I’m tired. Dead tired. So tired I can barely stay awake to write this. After helping Mr Bircher search for his head all night, I’m a little annoyed too. Dad doesn’t help. He doesn’t know what it's like for a girl my age, trying to fit in at school as much as possible, and trying to fit in all the dead people. It’s not easy being a soul helper.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a L.P. Donnelli: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a educacao. O trecho “I’m tired. Dead tired. So tired I can barely stay awake to write this. After helping Mr Bircher s…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que educacao, dead-diary, diary pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
